name: D2 Ch10 — Shrine of the Kuo-Toans Wandering Monsters, Western Half (1-in-12)
description: Wandering monster table for the Western Half of the Kuo-Toan Shrine cavern, Chapter 10 of D1-2. Encounter frequency: 1 in 12 per turn. Roll 1d12; on a 1, roll 1d8 on this table. Kuo-toan guard group: 8 warriors (2nd level), 1 sub-leader (3rd level), 1 leader (4th level). Drow merchant trains: see D1 Ch6 composition tables.

results.text: Drow merchants, small train (1–2 merchants, 2 fighters, 1 leader, 4 bugbear guards, 5–8 slave bearers, 1–2 pack lizards)
Kuo-Toan Guards (8 warriors HD 2 hp 12, 1 sub-leader HD 3, 1 leader HD 4 hp 28; XPV 60/119/222)
Drow merchants, large train (5–8 merchants, 12 fighters, 3 leaders, 16 bugbear guards, 17–24 slave bearers, 6–9 pack lizards)
Drow merchants, medium train (3–4 merchants, 6 fighters, 2 leaders, 8 bugbear guards, 9–16 slave bearers, 3–4 pack lizards)
Kuo-Toan Pilgrims (14–24 pilgrims unarmed, 2–5 warriors with dagger & short bow, 1 patrol leader with dagger & harpoon, 1 monitor, 2 priests unarmed, 11–14 slave bearers)
Kuo-Toan Priests — cleric party (7–12 warriors dagger/spear/shield, 5–8 warriors dagger/short bow, 2 patrol leaders dagger/harpoon, 4 priests unarmed, 1 lama unarmed, 5–8 slave bearers)
Drow merchants, small train (1–2 merchants, 2 fighters, 1 leader, 4 bugbear guards, 5–8 slave bearers, 1–2 pack lizards)
